summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of FitoutOS Commercial Interior Fitout Management application. All core functionality tested successfully including authentication, job management, navigation, and API endpoints.

minor_issues.issue: No master task codes are pre-populated in the system
minor_issues.impact: Jobs are created without default task codes, affecting timesheet functionality

design_issues.issue: Dashboard shows loading placeholders but no specific content widgets

passed_tests: Backend API authentication (login, register, get current user)
Frontend job creation via Quick Create dialog
Frontend navigation between all pages (Dashboard, Jobs, Tasks, Timesheets, Reports)
Integration between frontend and backend APIs
